headline: Woman's Stuffed Bear Demands 'Equal Time' With Her, Refuses To Stay On The Shelf
summary: The bear has become 'needy' and is now a 'constant companion' with 'separation anxiety.'
fullBody: Amanda McBears has been dealing with a needy stuffed bear. 'It won't stay on the shelf,' Amanda said. 'It demands equal time.' The bear is now a 'constant companion.' Amanda takes it everywhere. 'It has separation anxiety,' Amanda said. 'I'm its emotional support human.' The bear is now 'part of her identity.'
